name: White Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
Place the white chocolate in the top of a double boiler. Bring water to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cook until the chocolate melts.
Combine the cream cheese and powdered sugar in an electric mixer. Beat at medium speed until smooth. Add the grated white chocolate and vanilla extract, beating well to combine.
Stir in the chopped pecans. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 8-inch square pan.
Chill until firm, then cut into squares. Place a pecan half on top of each fudge square, pressing gently.
Store in the refrigerator.
